name: template-reschedule
description: Generate a meeting rescheduling email from a template. Supports three actions: 'generate' fills the template with provided variables (checks the knowledge graph for a user-customized template before falling back to the built-in default); 'save' stores a custom template in the knowledge graph; 'reset' removes the custom template and reverts to the built-in default.

inputs.sender_name: string? (required for generate — the person on whose behalf you're rescheduling)
inputs.original_time: string? (required for generate — the original meeting time)
inputs.proposed_times: string? (required for generate — comma-separated new proposed times)
inputs.meeting_subject: string? (optional for generate — what the meeting was about)
inputs.reason: string? (optional for generate — brief reason for rescheduling)
inputs.custom_template: string? (required for save — the template body to store)
